message:
fix(null-safety): remove non-null assertions in agent-analytics.service.ts

- calculatePercentile: use nullish coalescing instead of !
- mtbe calculation: guard array access with undefined check
- model recommendations: extract best/worst before condition check

Closes: bd-4ycmw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
